subject: A humanoid figure in white and red attire with white hair, surrounded by glowing purple energy absorption effects, floating pose
description: A humanoid figure with white hair floats in a dominant central pose surrounded by crackling purple and white energy effects that appear to be absorbed into or emanating from the figure. The outfit is white with red accents. The energy effects are dramatic and radiate outward in all directions. The background is dark with purple-violet energy contrast. The overall palette is high-contrast: white and red against dark purple and black.
foreground: White-haired figure in white-red outfit, floating, surrounded by purple energy absorption effects
background: Dark background with purple-violet energy radiating outward
emotion: cold power, absorptive menace, detached dominance
